testcase.name: DeepLearning.tsx page structure > has 150+ lines (stub replaced)
DeepLearning.tsx page structure > uses useSearchParams for URL state (AC-5 SHIELD #2)
DeepLearning.tsx page structure > supports ?tab=learn|library|apply URL values
DeepLearning.tsx page structure > renders 3 Tabs (学习/我的库/公式应用)
DeepLearning.tsx page structure > imports LearnTab, LibraryTab, ApplyFormulaTab from components
DeepLearning.tsx page structure > passes onSaved callback to LearnTab for library navigation
DeepLearningTabs.tsx structure > LearnTab textarea has ≥100 char validation (AC-2)
DeepLearningTabs.tsx structure > parse result shows coreFormula, hookType, structurePattern, emotionalArc, keywords (AC-2)
DeepLearningTabs.tsx structure > LibraryTab shows 截取文案 80字 truncation logic (AC-3)
DeepLearningTabs.tsx structure > LibraryTab has delete button calling trpc.deepLearning.delete (AC-3)
deepLearning router > exports deepLearningRouter with parse procedure (AC-6)
deepLearning router > exports deepLearningRouter with applyFormula procedure (AC-6)
deepLearning router > parse input requires sample ≥100 chars (AC-2)
deepLearning router > does NOT call deepLearningArchive.create (LD-A-5)
deepLearning router > parse uses mockAnalysis for P1 (DeepLearnAgent留PRD-7+)
